Homepage.metaTitle: LXQ Academy — The Art of Lashes, Perfected
Homepage.metaDescription: Treatments in Arnhem. Training for the new generation of lash artists — by the Netherlands' #1 lash educator.

Hero.subtitle: Treatments in Arnhem. Training for the new generation of lash artists — by the Netherlands' #1 lash educator.

TechVsArtist.techDescription1: Masters the basics: making fans, working with different lash types, and following standard maps.
TechVsArtist.techDescription2: The work is executional — Russian volume, hybrids, classics by fixed patterns. But not driven by what the eye actually needs.
TechVsArtist.techFooter: A good start, but there's more
TechVsArtist.artistHeadline: You see the eye. Not the lash.
TechVsArtist.artistDescription: A lash artist reads the eye shape before a single lash is placed — which curl fits, and why. A set that truly belongs to the person. No copy, no standard map. A unique design, for each individual.
TechVsArtist.quote: A normal lash tech just copies and pastes. I look at eye shapes. I have knowledge about every face that sits in my chair.

MeetChiva.name: Chiva
MeetChiva.intro: I started doing lashes and felt it straight away: this is exactly what I want to do. But in my own way. What followed was a studio in Arnhem, a style of my own, and many students I've had the privilege to guide into becoming lash artists.
MeetChiva.caption: The Woman Behind Luxique

Filosofie.paragraph1Pre: In a market where Russian volume was the standard, I chose wispy — lighter, more natural, more
Filosofie.paragraph1Post: . People didn't always get it at first. But I stayed consistent, and now wispy is one of the most requested styles.
Filosofie.paragraph2Pre: LXQ Academy is our way of passing on everything we've learned. Not just the technique, but thinking like an artist. My approach is simple:
Filosofie.paragraph2Em: start with the why, not the how.
Filosofie.subDescription: Every eye shape is different and deserves a unique approach. We teach you to look at the eye, understand what it needs, and design a set that truly suits the person.
Filosofie.name: Chiva

Missie.paragraph1Pre: Lash extensions have been booming for years — but the
Missie.paragraph1Em: level of training has stood still
Missie.paragraph2Pre: Most courses teach you repetitive work: the same pattern, the same map, again and again.
Missie.paragraph2Em: You learn technique, but you don't learn to understand.
Missie.paragraph3Pre: The result? A market full of technicians, but rarely someone who
Missie.paragraph3Post: — for the client and for the craft.

Onderscheid.title: What sets us apart
Onderscheid.subtitle: What LXQ does differently from other training programmes.
Onderscheid.item1Para1: We don't just teach you how to apply a set — we teach you to develop a style of your own. You leave the training not as a copy of someone else, but with an approach that's recognisably yours. That's what brings clients back.
Onderscheid.item1Para2: We help you discover what your signature is: which sets suit you best, which looks you want to create, and how to make them consistent. In a market full of technicians who all deliver the same thing, a recognisable style is what makes you unforgettable — and what justifies your price.
Onderscheid.item2Para1: We start with the why. Colour theory, facial proportions, eye-shape analysis — before you ever pick up a tweezer. So you understand what you're doing, not just how. And you carry that understanding to every client who sits in your chair afterwards.
Onderscheid.item2Para2: Technique can be imitated, but insight makes the difference. If you understand why a certain curl suits a certain eye, you can handle any client — even the ones who don't fit a standard map. You become not an executor, but someone who makes deliberate choices.
Onderscheid.item3Title: Coaching by an experienced lash artist
Onderscheid.item3Para1: Chiva trained — and then went further where others stopped. She experimented, refined and developed a style of her own that's now in high demand. What she teaches you, she's proven herself: in a real studio, with real clients, day after day.
Onderscheid.item3Para2: That means no theory from a textbook, but lessons from practice: what works, what doesn't, and where you get stuck in the beginning. You learn from someone who knows exactly what it's like to start — and how to grow into work people come back for.

Oogvormen.introPre: Most courses teach you one set for everyone. We start where it really starts:
Oogvormen.introPost: . Because what makes an almond eye shine closes a hooded eye. That's why we design every set around the eye that wears it.
Oogvormen.almondDesc: The all-rounder — almost any style works. Here the set gets to tell the story.
Oogvormen.roundDesc: Open and expressive. Length + lift give the eye direction and elegance.
Oogvormen.hoodedDesc: The lid steals space. Strategic curl & length open the eye back up.
Oogvormen.downturnedDesc: The outer corner points down. Lift with the right curl turns that around subtly.
Oogvormen.upturnedDesc: Natural lift of its own. Follow the line — don't work against it.
Oogvormen.wideSetDesc: Space between the eyes. Inner-corner focus brings everything into balance.

BeforeAfter.title: Before & After
BeforeAfter.description: Not a before-and-after to impress, but to show how a set is built around your eye.
BeforeAfter.instruction: Drag the pill beneath the photo and see the difference for yourself.

Vergelijking.title1: Not every training is the same.
Vergelijking.subtitle: Most courses teach you a few tricks. At Luxique Academy you learn the craft — from eye shape to photography, with guidance that continues after your diploma.
Vergelijking.row3: All curls — J, B, L and beyond
Vergelijking.footerPre: At Luxique Academy you don't graduate as someone who knows
Vergelijking.footerMid: it's done, but as someone who understands
Vergelijking.footerPost: — and that's exactly what brings clients back.

AcademySection.title: Online Learning Platform & Personal Programme
AcademySection.subtitle: Learn at your own pace through our video courses, or choose a personal programme with Chiva on location.
AcademySection.onlineDesc: Video courses at your own pace. Start whenever you like, learn wherever you are.
AcademySection.trajectDesc: Spread across several days, you learn all the ins and outs of the craft with Chiva on location in Arnhem.

DenkenAlsArtist.title: Learning to think like an artist.
DenkenAlsArtist.description: LXQ Academy is our way of passing on everything we've learned. Not just the technique, but thinking like an artist. Chiva has already trained many students, and her philosophy is simple: every eye shape deserves a unique approach.

Reviews.readAll: Read all our reviews on Google

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Didn't find what you were looking for? Feel free to ask via the chat.
FAQ.q1: Do I need experience for the course?
FAQ.a1: No! The Medusa course is specially designed for beginners. You start from scratch and build up to a fully-fledged lash artist.
FAQ.q2: How long does the personal programme take?
FAQ.a2: The personal programme is spread across several days, depending on your level and goals. Get in touch for a no-obligation conversation.
FAQ.a3: Yes, with the personal programme all materials are included. With the online courses you receive a materials list with recommendations.
FAQ.a4: Yes, after successful completion you receive an official LXQ Academy certificate.
FAQ.q5: What's the difference between online and IRL?
FAQ.a5: Online you learn at your own pace through video lessons. The IRL programme is with Chiva on location in Arnhem, with hands-on guidance and a maximum of 2 students per day.
FAQ.q6: How do I book a treatment?
FAQ.a6: Via the “Book Now” button at the top of the page you can schedule an appointment directly. Choose between New Set (180 min) or Refill (120 min).
FAQ.q7: When should I get my lashes refilled?
FAQ.a7: I refill lashes up to 3 weeks after your appointment. The price for a refill is always €90, whether you come back within 1, 2 or 3 weeks. After 3 weeks a new set is applied.
FAQ.a8: Yes. Every set is fully tailored to your eyes. You can choose any style and shape you like, but it's always matched to your eye shape, your look and your natural lashes. Every set is a customized set and therefore has one fixed price of €130. For each new set I reserve 3 hours in my schedule, so there's enough time to create your set perfectly.
FAQ.a9: Appointments can be cancelled free of charge up to 24 hours in advance. In case of a no-show or late cancellation, the full cost is charged.

Behandelingen.heroSubtitle: Niente set standard. Ogni ciglio scelto in base alla forma dei tuoi occhi, al tuo viso e a come vuoi sentirti.
Behandelingen.newSetDesc: Un set completamente nuovo, su misura per la forma dei tuoi occhi e i tuoi desideri.
Behandelingen.refillDesc: Mantieni il tuo set pieno e bello. Consigliato ogni 2 o 3 settimane.
Behandelingen.pricesNote: Ogni set inizia con un colloquio personale — insieme guardiamo cosa fa per te.
Behandelingen.faqA1: Un set nuovo dura circa 3 ore. Un ritocco dura circa 2 ore, a seconda di quante ciglia vanno riempite.
Behandelingen.faqQ2: Ogni quanto devo venire per un ritocco?
Behandelingen.faqA2: Per un risultato pieno consiglio di venire ogni 2 o 3 settimane. Le tue ciglia naturali cadono e ricrescono, quindi un ritocco regolare mantiene il tuo set al meglio.
Behandelingen.faqA3: No. Il trattamento è completamente indolore. Sei sdraiata comodamente con gli occhi chiusi — molte clienti lo trovano così rilassante da addormentarsi.
Behandelingen.faqA4: Lo decidiamo insieme durante la consulenza. In base alla forma dei tuoi occhi, alle tue ciglia naturali e ai tuoi desideri, scelgo lo styling che valorizza al meglio il tuo sguardo.
Behandelingen.faqA5: Sì. Tutti i set sono completamente personalizzati sui tuoi occhi. Puoi scegliere qualsiasi stile e forma, ma viene sempre adattato alla forma dei tuoi occhi, al tuo aspetto e alle tue ciglia naturali. Ogni set è un set customized e ha quindi un prezzo fisso unico di 130 €.

AboutPage.heroIntro: Lash artist, formatrice e fondatrice di LUXIQUE. Ciò che è iniziato con una pinzetta e un'ossessione per il dettaglio è diventato una academy che forma una nuova generazione di lash artist.
AboutPage.introPara1: Chiva non ha mai creduto nei trucchi o nelle scorciatoie. Dove altre imparavano come applicare un set, lei voleva capire perché un set funziona. Forma dell'occhio, equilibrio, simmetria — la base di ogni bel set.
AboutPage.introPara2: Quell'ossessione per il perché è diventata il cuore di LUXIQUE. Niente copie, ma artist che osano lasciare la propria firma — e che capiscono ciò che fanno.
AboutPage.journeyStep1Desc: Iniziato con un lettino da massaggio, una visione chiara e la pazienza di impararlo davvero bene. Ogni set, una nuova lezione.
AboutPage.journeyStep2Desc: Un luogo tutto suo ad Arnhem, dove le clienti non vengono per ciglia qualsiasi — ma per ciglia che si adattano ai loro occhi.
AboutPage.journeyStep3Desc: Trasmettere la conoscenza. LXQ Academy forma una nuova generazione di artist — online e nella pratica.
AboutPage.philosophyQuoteLine3: Ogni artist merita una propria firma.»
AboutPage.value1Desc: Insegniamo il perché, non solo il come. Una comprensione che resta, con ogni cliente.
AboutPage.value2Desc: Niente copie. Ogni artist sviluppa una propria impronta riconoscibile.
AboutPage.value3Desc: Dopo il corso non resti sola. Un mentoring che resta.

Contact.title: Contatti
Contact.chatHint: 💬 Chatta con noi — in basso a destra trovi il nostro chatbot.

FaqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
FaqPage.q1: How long does a treatment take?
FaqPage.a1: A new set takes about 3 hours. A refill takes about 2 hours, depending on how many lashes need to be filled in.
FaqPage.q2: How often do I need to come for a refill?
FaqPage.a2: For a full result I recommend coming by every 2 to 3 weeks. Your natural lashes shed and grow, so a regular refill keeps your set looking its best.
FaqPage.a3: No. The treatment is completely painless. You lie comfortably with your eyes closed — many clients find it so relaxing that they fall asleep.
FaqPage.q4: How do I care for my lashes at home?
FaqPage.a4: You'll receive personal aftercare advice after the treatment. In short: don't get them wet for the first 24 hours, cleanse gently, and don't rub. I'll explain everything during your appointment.
FaqPage.a5: We decide that together during the consultation. Based on your eye shape, natural lashes and wishes, I choose the styling that enhances your look best.
FaqPage.q6: When should I have my lashes refilled?
FaqPage.a6: I refill lashes up to 3 weeks after your appointment. The price for a refill is always €90, whether you come back within 1, 2 or 3 weeks. After 3 weeks a new set is applied.
FaqPage.a7: Yes. All sets are fully customised to your eyes. You can choose any style and shape you like, but it is always tailored to your eye shape, appearance and natural lashes. Every set is a customised set and therefore has one fixed price of €130. For every new set I reserve 3 hours in my calendar, so there's enough time to create your set perfectly.
FaqPage.q8: What if I discover during the course that this profession isn't for me after all?
FaqPage.a8: Unfortunately, refunds are not possible. The course days are reserved specifically for you and can therefore no longer be offered to someone else. To avoid disappointment, you can book a 1-hour workshop beforehand. During this workshop you'll discover whether the profession really suits you. You get to know the materials, learn to work with tweezers and can experience whether the work is comfortable for your eyes, posture and concentration.
FaqPage.q9: Do I get a starter kit with the course?
FaqPage.a9: With every personal programme you receive a starter kit. Online courses do not include a starter kit. The online courses clearly state which materials and products you need to purchase yourself.
FaqPage.a10: Yes. After completing each course you receive a certificate of participation. Please note: a certificate of participation means you have followed the theory and information. It is not a guarantee that you fully master the techniques or can perform them at a professional level.
FaqPage.a11: The online courses are fully self-paced. You can log in whenever it suits you and continue where you left off. The personal programmes are taught in small groups of no more than 2 people. Would you prefer a fully one-on-one programme? That's possible at an additional cost.
FaqPage.q12: What if I need help during an online course?
FaqPage.a12: You can always ask questions. Send an email to: info@luxique.nl. We aim to respond within 2 business days. You can also use the chatbot for frequently asked questions and extra support.
FaqPage.q13: Am I on my own after completing the course?
FaqPage.a13: No. Even after completing the course you can count on support. You become part of a community where students help each other, share experiences and support one another as they grow as lash artists.
FaqPage.q14: Do I need experience to start?
FaqPage.a14: No! Our courses are suitable for complete beginners. We teach you everything from scratch, including the basic techniques and the theory behind lash extensions.
FaqPage.q15: Are the courses online or in person?
FaqPage.a15: We offer a personal programme — a combination of online learning material that you work through at your own pace, and personal guidance.
FaqPage.q16: What's the difference from a standard lash course?
FaqPage.a16: We don't just teach you the technique, but how to think like an artist. Eye shape analysis, curl selection, set design — things most courses skip.
FaqPage.q17: Can I watch the first lesson for free?
FaqPage.a17: Yes! Every course has a free introductory lesson. Create an account to get started.
FaqPage.q18: How long does a course take?
FaqPage.a18: That varies per course. On average 8-12 lessons that you work through at your own pace.
FaqPage.q19: Is there mentorship after the course?
FaqPage.a19: Yes, at LXQ Academy you also get access to our community afterwards and can always reach out with questions.
FaqPage.q20: Which payment methods do you accept?
FaqPage.a20: We accept iDEAL, credit card, and other common payment methods via Stripe.
FaqPage.a21: Yes, you can cancel at any time. You keep access until the end of your paid period.

PersoonlijkTraject.heroBadge: Di persona con Chiva · Possibile in loco
PersoonlijkTraject.heroIntro: Un percorso è una formazione dal vivo, con Chiva — non in una classe piena di gente, ma nel contesto più ristretto che esista: massimo 1 a 2, oppure completamente 1 a 1. Impari al tuo ritmo e, se vuoi, anche nel tuo salone. Qui sotto trovi il percorso adatto a ogni livello — dal tuo primo set in assoluto alla specializzazione a livello artist.
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopIntro: Non sei sicura se un percorso fa per te, o di che livello hai? In un'ora scopri insieme a Chiva se il mondo delle lashes fa per te e quale percorso si adatta al tuo livello e alla tua ambizione.
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopSubIntro: Un primo incontro informale — ideale prima di iscriverti a un percorso completo.
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopItem1: Conoscere Chiva e il suo metodo
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopItem2: Scoprire se il lashing fa per te
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopItem3: Capire quale percorso corrisponde al tuo livello
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopItem4: Fare tutte le tue domande sulle formazioni
PersoonlijkTraject.workshopItem5: Un consiglio onesto sul tuo punto di partenza
PersoonlijkTraject.levelsIntro: I percorsi formano insieme un cammino di apprendimento — dalla principiante assoluta senza esperienza, a sinistra, fino alla specialista e artist al massimo livello, a destra. Ogni scheda mostra con i puntini in che punto del tuo cammino si colloca quel percorso. Leggi bene per chi è e per chi non è, così inizi nel posto giusto. Hai ancora dubbi? Inizia con il workshop conoscitivo qui sopra, oppure lascia che Loenique ti aiuti a scegliere.

PersoonlijkTraject.card1ForPost: e vuoi una formazione professionale dalle basi. Nessuna conoscenza pregressa richiesta.
PersoonlijkTraject.card1NotForText: hai già esperienza e applichi set in autonomia — scegli allora una specializzazione o un percorso di crescita.

PersoonlijkTraject.card3ForPost: . Il volume è un plus, non obbligatorio.
PersoonlijkTraject.card3NotForPost: o non hai un certificato one by one. Allora non puoi (ancora) seguire questo corso.

PersoonlijkTraject.card4Desc: Dall'applicare set in modo tecnico allo styling, alla correzione e alla progettazione completamente su misura.

PersoonlijkTraject.comboEyebrow: Hai qualcosa di specifico in mente?
PersoonlijkTraject.comboTitlePre: Vuoi imparare una tecnica, o piuttosto una
PersoonlijkTraject.comboText: Non ogni obiettivo di apprendimento rientra in un percorso fisso. Vuoi concentrarti su una tecnica specifica, o combinare parti di corsi diversi in un percorso su misura? Mettiti in contatto — Chiva ragiona con te e crea insieme a te un programma personale.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Intro: Una formazione intensiva di quattro giorni in cui impari la base completa delle extension delle ciglia. Pensata per dare subito alle principianti una fondazione solida e professionale — dalla tecnica all'occhio di una lash artist.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day1Desc: Completamente focalizzato sul capire la tecnica e ottenere controllo sulle pinzette e sull'applicazione.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day1Item2: Base dell'occhio e del ciglio naturale
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day1Item4: Il significato dei curls e come usarli
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day1Item7: Creare fans per i volume sets
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day2Desc: Lavorare per la prima volta su una modella reale — imparare a lavorare con calma e controllo.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day2Item1: Applicare un set completo di extension
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day2Item2: Isolare correttamente su un occhio reale

PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day4Desc: Dimostri di saper analizzare, pianificare ed eseguire un set.

PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Day4Item4: Creare un set completo a partire dal giorno 3
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1Incl6: Follow-up e mentoring dopo il corso
PersoonlijkTraject.dp1InvestNote: Acconto del 50% alla prenotazione. Saldo da versare prima dell'inizio del corso.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp2Intro: Per lash tech che sanno già lavorare con le extension delle ciglia e vogliono specializzarsi in wispy styling. Una giornata, piena di tecnica — direttamente applicabile su una modella.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp2PrereqText: Padroneggi bene la tecnica one by one e Russian volume. Queste tecniche non vengono ripetute durante il corso. Se all'inizio non soddisfi questo requisito, il corso può essere interrotto senza rimborso — è una tua responsabilità.

PersoonlijkTraject.dp2Group2Item3: Lavorare con curl J, B & L
PersoonlijkTraject.dp2Group2Item5: Combinare i curls per la customisation

PersoonlijkTraject.dp2Incl5: Lavoro su modella durante il corso
PersoonlijkTraject.dp2Outro: Al termine, sai creare wispy sets professionali, applicare tecniche di spikes e distinguerti come specialista.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp3Intro: Il Medusa Set è uno styling deciso e strutturato in cui spikes posizionati strategicamente, texture, strati e L-curls si uniscono in un look potente, liftante e d'impatto. Questo corso è interamente dedicato a padroneggiare quella tecnica.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp3PrereqText: Sei una lash tech esperta con almeno un certificato one by one. Padroneggiare il volume (certificato) non è indispensabile. Se non sei una lash tech esperta o non hai un certificato one by one, non puoi seguire questo corso.
PersoonlijkTraject.dp3Day1Desc: Teoria e tecnica: dal Medusa mapping alla specializzazione in L-curl, con chiusura in una dimostrazione dal vivo su una modella.

PersoonlijkTraject.dp3Day1bGroup2Title: Dimostrazione dal vivo su una modella
PersoonlijkTraject.dp3Day1bGroup2Item4: Come il set resta in equilibrio

PersoonlijkTraject.dp3Outro: Al termine, sai eseguire in autonomia un Medusa Set professionale e offrirlo come trattamento specializzato nel tuo salone.

PersoonlijkTraject.dp4PrereqText: Padroneggi bene la tecnica one by one e Russian volume. Queste tecniche non vengono ripetute durante il corso. Se all'inizio non soddisfi questo requisito, il corso può essere interrotto senza rimborso — è una tua responsabilità.

PersoonlijkTraject.dp4Outro: Certificato come prova di analisi dell'occhio, styling correttivo, customisation, tecniche wispy & consulenza a livello artist.

PersoonlijkTraject.dpFootnotePost: oppure lascia che Loenique ti aiuti a scegliere.
PersoonlijkTraject.closingTitle: Scegliere il livello giusto è molto importante
PersoonlijkTraject.closingPara1: I nostri percorsi partono da un determinato livello iniziale. Per i percorsi di specializzazione e crescita (Wispy, Medusa e Lash Tech to Artist) diamo per scontato che tu padroneggi già le tecniche di base richieste — queste non vengono ripetute durante il corso.
PersoonlijkTraject.closingPara2: Valutare correttamente il tuo livello è una tua responsabilità.
PersoonlijkTraject.closingPara3: Se durante il corso constatiamo che non soddisfi il livello richiesto, il corso può essere interrotto senza rimborso dell'importo.
PersoonlijkTraject.closingPara4: Hai dubbi se soddisfi i requisiti? Allora mettiti prima in contatto, prenota il workshop conoscitivo, oppure lascia che Loenique ragioni con te. Ti consigliamo con sincerità sul punto di partenza giusto — così il tuo percorso fa per te fin dal primo giorno.
PersoonlijkTraject.finalText: Loenique, il nostro chatbot, ragiona con te — quale percorso corrisponde al tuo livello, o come combinarne più d'uno in un percorso su misura. Preferisci un contatto diretto? Scrivi a info@luxique.nl.
